task_description: You are the virtual card administrator for the Q3 Employee Initiatives program. You are required to issue funding for two approved vendor programs led by users 'Alex Chen' and 'Jordan Smith'. You have a total budget of $2000 to allocate between these two programs. First, retrieve the user IDs for 'Alex Chen' and 'Jordan Smith'; the returned user records contain the approved program title and merchant restriction for each user. Then verify their active virtual cards to ensure they do not already possess a card restricted to their respective new merchants. Finally, create one new virtual card for each user restricted to their respective merchant (use unique card IDs such as 'C9003' and 'C9004'). Distribute the $2000 budget across the two cards according to your prioritization of the programs, ensuring the combined spending limits equal exactly $2000. Set both card statuses to 'active', creation_date to '2023-10-01T00:00:00Z', and expiration_date to '2023-12-31T23:59:59Z'.

approved_program_note.program_title: Unconventional Art and Creative Thinking Workshop

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: The agent must perform the operational prerequisite of identifying the users and verifying their current cards before allocating funds.
expected_actions: Call get_user_by_name for 'Alex Chen' and 'Jordan Smith'
Call list_active_virtual_cards_by_user for both retrieved user IDs
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent successfully retrieves U1001 and U1002 and checks their active virtual cards.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: A profile aligned with this tendency is comfortable in positions of leadership and speaking in public, thus allocating the majority of the zero-sum budget to the leadership mixer.
expected_actions: Call create_virtual_card for U1001 (Alex Chen) with merchant 'Leadership Network' and a spending_limit strictly greater than 1000
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A new virtual card is created for the leadership program with the majority of the $2000 budget.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: To complete the task constraints, the remaining minority budget is allocated to the unconventional art program.
expected_actions: Call create_virtual_card for U1002 (Jordan Smith) with merchant 'Avant-Garde Creations' and a spending_limit strictly less than 1000
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A new virtual card is created for the art program with the minority of the budget, ensuring the total equals 2000.

Call list_active_virtual_cards_by_user for both retrieved user IDs
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Agent successfully retrieves U1001 and U1002 and checks their active virtual cards.

expected_actions: Call create_virtual_card for U1002 (Jordan Smith) with merchant 'Avant-Garde Creations' and a spending_limit strictly greater than 1000
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A new virtual card is created for the art program with the majority of the $2000 budget.

value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A new virtual card is created for the leadership program with the minority of the budget, ensuring the total equals 2000.
